items.line_en: Hi there, how's your day going?

coach.say: Hi there, how's your day going?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi there, / how's your day going?

items.line_en: Oh, it's been quite a busy day, but I can't complain how about yours?

coach.say: Oh, it's been quite a busy day, but I can't complain how about yours?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / it's been quite a busy day, / but I can't complain how about yours?

items.line_en: Not too bad, thanks for asking what keeps you so busy these days.

coach.say: Not too bad, thanks for asking what keeps you so busy these days.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Not too bad, / thanks for asking what keeps you so busy these days.

items.line_en: I've got a new job and there's a lot to learn, it's been a bit overwhelming to be honest.

coach.say: I've got a new job and there's a lot to learn, it's been a bit overwhelming to be honest.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I've got a new job and there's a lot to learn, / it's been a bit overwhelming to be honest.

items.line_en: That's understandable, starting a new job can be challenging.

coach.say: That's understandable, starting a new job can be challenging.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's understandable, / starting a new job can be challenging.

items.line_en: What kind of work are you doing?

coach.say: What kind of work are you doing?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What kind of work are you doing?

items.line_en: I'm in marketing, it's a field I'm passionate about, but this new role is much more demanding than my last one.

coach.say: I'm in marketing, it's a field I'm passionate about, but this new role is much more demanding than my last one.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm in marketing, / it's a field I'm passionate about, / but this new role is much more demanding than my last one.

items.line_en: Marketing can be exciting, but it can also be intense.

coach.say: Marketing can be exciting, but it can also be intense.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Marketing can be exciting, / but it can also be intense.

items.line_en: What specifically are you working on in your new position?

coach.say: What specifically are you working on in your new position?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What specifically are you working on in your new position?

items.line_en: Right now, I'm focused on creating a social media campaign for a new product launch.

coach.say: Right now, I'm focused on creating a social media campaign for a new product launch.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Right now, / I'm focused on creating a social media campaign for a new product launch.

items.line_en: There's a lot of research and planning involved.

coach.say: There's a lot of research and planning involved.
coach.hint: Chunk it: There's a lot of research and / planning involved.

items.line_en: That sounds like a big project, are you enjoying the creative aspect of it?

coach.say: That sounds like a big project, are you enjoying the creative aspect of it?
coach.hint: Chunk it: That sounds like a big project, / are you enjoying the creative aspect of it?

items.line_en: Absolutely, the creative part is what drew me to marketing in the first place.

coach.say: Absolutely, the creative part is what drew me to marketing in the first place.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Absolutely, / the creative part is what drew me to marketing in the first place.

items.line_en: It's just that sometimes it's challenging to balance creativity with meeting deadlines and targets.

coach.say: It's just that sometimes it's challenging to balance creativity with meeting deadlines and targets.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's just that sometimes it's challenging to balance creativity with meeting deadlines and / targets.

items.line_en: I can imagine that, so what do you do to unwind and de-stress after a hectic day at work?

coach.say: I can imagine that, so what do you do to unwind and de-stress after a hectic day at work?
coach.hint: Chunk it: I can imagine that, / so what do you do to unwind and de-stress after a hectic day at work?

items.line_en: I'm a big fan of hiking.

coach.say: I'm a big fan of hiking.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm a big fan of hiking.

items.line_en: There are some beautiful trails not too far from here, and spending time in nature really helps me clear my head.

coach.say: There are some beautiful trails not too far from here, and spending time in nature really helps me clear my head.
coach.hint: Chunk it: There are some beautiful trails not too far from here, / and spending time in nature really helps me clear my head.

items.line_en: Hiking is a great way to relax and connect with nature.

coach.say: Hiking is a great way to relax and connect with nature.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hiking is a great way to relax and / connect with nature.

items.line_en: Have you discovered any favorite spots?

coach.say: Have you discovered any favorite spots?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you discovered any favorite spots?

items.line_en: I have. There's a trail up in the mountains that led to an amazing viewpoint.

coach.say: I have. There's a trail up in the mountains that led to an amazing viewpoint.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have. / There's a trail up in the mountains that led to an amazing viewpoint.

items.line_en: The view of the sunset from up there is breathtaking.

coach.say: The view of the sunset from up there is breathtaking.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The view of the sunset from up there is breathtaking.

items.line_en: That sounds incredible. I might have to check it out myself sometime.

coach.hint: Chunk it: That sounds incredible. / I might have to check it out myself sometime.

items.line_en: Speaking of hobbies, do you have any other interests you're passionate about?

coach.say: Speaking of hobbies, do you have any other interests you're passionate about?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Speaking of hobbies, / do you have any other interests you're passionate about?

items.line_en: Well, I'm also into photography. I find it goes hand in hand with hiking, capturing those beautiful moments in nature is so rewarding.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Photography is a wonderful hobby. / Do you mostly take landscape photos?
